name: Oral Octave
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: With eager hungry lust, [AttackerName] passionately smooches [TargetName] with a building intensity that smoothly matches the music's powerfully resounding beats, eight smacks of her soft lips against [TargetHisOrHer] own docilely receptive mouth ringing through the air and into [TargetHisOrHer] ears in quick succession!|n|Each erotic resonation phantasmally dances through [TargetName]'s brain in a flurry of magically amplified kisses and heated sighs, like a moaning melody getting poured straight into [TargetHisOrHer] increasingly vacant head, making [TargetHimOrHer] sink deeper and deeper into enchanting kissy bliss.
miss: With eager hungry lust, [AttackerName] passionately smooches [TargetName] with building intensity that smoothly matches the music's powerfully resounding beats, eight smacks of her soft lips against [TargetHisOrHer] own mouth ringing through the air and into [TargetHisOrHer] ears in quick succession, but [TargetName] heroically manages to gather [TargetHisOrHer] dwindling self-restraint and endure the escalating makeout session!
statusOutcome: At the end of the musically captivating parade of kisses, [TargetName]'s head is left feeling wonderfully emptied of coherent thought and full of the clinging sensation of [AttackerName]'s aurally enhanced oral cascade, the feeling of the enchantingly lingering smooches sapping away at [TargetHisOrHer] Willpower...
